% LuaLaTeX standalone template for preset reference PNGs.
% Generated by scripts/generate-preset-pngs.ts — do not edit by hand.
%
% Placeholders:
%   __FONT_PATH_DIR__ — directory containing .ttf files
%   __FONT_FILE__     — font filename
%   __RAW_FEATURE__   — RawFeature line (mode=harf, axis settings)
%   __FONT_SIZE__     — size in TeX pt
%   __LEADING__       — baseline skip in TeX pt
%   __LINE_WIDTH__    — \hsize in TeX pt
%   __PARAGRAPH__     — the text
\documentclass[border=4pt]{standalone}
\usepackage{fontspec}
\usepackage{luacode}
\usepackage{varwidth}

\setmainfont[
  Path=__FONT_PATH_DIR__/,
  __RAW_FEATURE__
  Ligatures=Common,
  Kerning=On
]{__FONT_FILE__}

\begin{document}

\begin{varwidth}{__LINE_WIDTH__pt}

% ── Font size ──
\fontsize{__FONT_SIZE__pt}{__LEADING__pt}\selectfont

% ── Line width ──
\hsize=__LINE_WIDTH__pt
\textwidth=\hsize
\linewidth=\hsize

% ── Override fontdimen to match app's space stretch/shrink ──
\directlua{
  local fid = font.current()
  local fd = font.getfont(fid)
  if fd and fd.parameters then
    local sp = fd.parameters.space or 0
    fd.parameters.space_stretch = sp * 0.5
    fd.parameters.space_shrink  = sp * 0.2
    font.setfont(fid, fd)
  end
}

% ── KP parameters matching the app ──
\linepenalty=10
\hyphenpenalty=50
\exhyphenpenalty=50
\adjdemerits=3000
\doublehyphendemerits=3000
\finalhyphendemerits=5000
\widowpenalty=50
\clubpenalty=0
\brokenpenalty=0

\tolerance=21600
\pretolerance=-1

\lefthyphenmin=100
\righthyphenmin=100

\parindent=0pt

% Hz font expansion
__ADJUSTSPACING__

\noindent __PARAGRAPH__
\par

\end{varwidth}
\end{document}
